productDisplayName: Fabindia Women Printed Multi Coloured Chanderi Stole
description: Style Notefabindia's natural, craft-based pieces reference ethnic garments and fabric.  This stylish stole perfectly captures the traditional mood of the moment with its chanderi patterning. Chanderi fabric is renowned for its very fine gossamer quality, placement of motifs and design intricacy, and has been the chosen fabric for saris produced for the royalty. The fabric's unique qualities result from the traditional method of sizing and hand weaving developed over the centuries. Twist it into a stylish knot or wrap it around your shoulders and feel the luxe fabric caressing your skin. Product DetailsMulti coloured printed stole made of a silk /cotton blendMaterial and CareSilk and cotton blended fabricDry clean onlySizeApproximate Length: 180 cm
